scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:wrapper && bun run build:concentrator && bun run build:cli
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && cd web && bun run typecheck
scripts.install-cli: bun run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && cp bin/rclaude bin/concentrator bin/concentrator-cli ~/.local/bin/ && echo 'Installed rclaude, concentrator, and concentrator-cli to ~/.local/bin'
